nasb.text: The word that came to Jeremiah for all the Jews living in the land of Egypt, those who were living in Migdol, Tahpanhes, Memphis, and the land of Pathros, saying,

esv.text: The word that came to Jeremiah concerning all the Judeans who lived in the land of Egypt, at Migdol, at Tahpanhes, at Memphis, and in the land of Pathros,

cnv.text: 以下的話臨到耶利米，論到所有住在埃及地的猶大人，就是那些住在密奪、答比匿、挪弗和巴忒羅地的人，說：

ccb.text: 论到那些住在埃及境内的密夺、答比匿、挪弗和巴特罗地区的犹大人，耶和华的话传给了耶利米，说：
